thesis: PRE-CLOSE window (15:00-ET slot) — the tomorrow-first plan on the latest live tick (deterministic snapshot asOf 2026-07-22T18:48:22Z, ~14:48 ET Wednesday 7/22). HONEST LABELING: the snapshot self-labels window='morning' while its asOf ~14:48 ET actually falls in the pre-close (15:00 ET) slot, and marketClosed=false — so these are a LIVE INTRADAY tick for 7/22, NOT a confirmed settled 7/22 daily close; snapshot.nextSessionDate is still 2026-07-22 (it has NOT rolled to 7/23), so the plan is authored for that date as the system defines it (positioning into the close and overnight). STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended tech-led structural bull is still DIGESTING near all-time highs and the index/leadership split PERSISTS, but into the close it FIRMED marginally rather than deteriorated. What holds and firmed: SPY 748.44 is bull-stacked and firmed to +0.59% above its 50-day (~744.0, up from +0.44% at the morning read) and is now only -1.21% off the ATH (~757.6, from -1.36%), with VIX low and flat at 17.0 (-0.11 vs 17.11); SPMO 150.72 RECLAIMED its 50-day (ma50Dist now +0.19, from -0.19) and firmed (mom5 +0.48, from +0.09) — a small leadership positive. What is still UNWON: QQQ 707.33 stays TANGLED and -1.59% below its 50-day (~718.8) — the gap eased slightly (from -1.69%) and mom5 is less negative (-1.45), but the reclaim is still unwon; MSFT 388.78 is still bear-stacked and -2.84% below its 50-day (~400.1) — the failed reclaim confirmed lower has NOT repaired, -10.85% below its 200-day. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars: 7 confirmed (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17); the snapshot's nextSessionDate is unchanged at 7/22 vs the morning run, so no additional settled bars are enumerated — the theme extends to ~9 distinct completed daily bars (7/09->7/21) as an INFERRED extension from the earlier date roll; today 7/22 is a live intraday tick — NOT counted — and intraday reruns are not counted. FRAME: SPMO bull-stacked and firming (reclaimed its 50-day) / VGT 115.87 tangled (ma50Dist -0.52, mom5 -0.54, less soft) — both still soft on 21-day. ROTATION: the owning sector RRG refreshed THIS run (asOf 2026-07-22T18:48:21Z) now reads 'Rotate toward XLRE as XLV weakens' — a WITHIN-DAY designation shift from the morning run's 'toward XLE'. Anti-whipsaw: treat this as one Leading rate-sensitive + energy 'into' cluster funded from weakening healthcare rather than chasing the specific name: XLRE Leading (rsRatio 100.38>100, accel +1.5, rotation into, +7.55% over its 200-day) AND XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.76>100, rsMom 102.08 board-best, accel +1.1, rotation into, +15.07% over its 200-day, commodity-confirmed: real-assets PDBC 70.1 Uptrend, commodity breadth 75) are BOTH the leading 'into' names, versus XLV Weakening (rsMom 98.25, accel -2.7, out) and XLI Weakening (out); XLK is Basing up (rsMom 99.81<100, accel +0.54) — no longer a clean 'into'. Semis re-rated Leading (SOXX rsMom 100.2, accel +1.16) with internals that FIRMED marginally (above-50 4/12 from 3, up-momentum 3/12 from 0) but stay THIN (rsMom1m -15.31). TACTICAL, last: monthly OPEX (7/17) is RESOLVED and dealer gamma has RESET — prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, the pin/magnet into the close, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing any into-the-close gamma trade, vol-term claim or Fed positioning. PLAN into the close and overnight: HOLD the bull-stack and do NOT chase index beta into ATH resistance while QQQ is tangled below its 50-day (SPY's held reclaim still needs QQQ to confirm the broadening); ROTATE toward the confirmed Leading rate-sensitive/energy 'into' cluster (XLRE per this run, XLE the commodity-confirmed board-best) over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, still internally-thin semis into any close strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT after it stayed below its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge overnight toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail — low, flat VIX keeps it cheap, not less necessary — after re-verifying the live path; stay OUT of precious-metal havens (GLD 17.5 washed / SLV 0).
